sql.where:
p.USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED'
AND ( p.PAGE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' OR p.CREATE_USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{req.search} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT p.PAGE_ID AS pageId, p.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, p.CREATE_USER_NAME AS createUserName, CASE WHEN lh.FILE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'http://' || si.INSTANCE_IP || ':' || TO_CHAR(si.INSTANCE_PORT) || '/deployed/' || p.PAGE_ID || '.html' END AS deployedUrl FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(FILE_ID, '_v\d+\.html$', '') AS PAGE_ID, FILE_ID, INSTANCE_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY REGEXP_REPLACE(FILE_ID, '_v\d+\.html$', '') ORDER BY LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC ) AS RN FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS WHERE FILE_ID LIKE '%_v%.html' ) lh ON lh.PAGE_ID = p.PAGE_ID AND lh.RN = 1 LEFT JOIN FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE si ON lh.INSTANCE_ID = si.INSTANCE_ID
ORDER BY p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST ) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INNER_QRY.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT h.INSTANCE_ID AS instanceId, s.INSTANCE_NAME AS instanceName, s.INSTANCE_IP AS instanceIp, s.INSTANCE_PORT AS instancePort, h.FILE_ID AS fileId, h.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, h.FILE_CRC_VALUE AS fileCrcValue, h.LAST_MODIFIER_ID AS lastModifierId, h.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME AS lastModifiedDtime FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS h JOIN FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE s ON h.INSTANCE_ID = s.INSTANCE_ID
ORDER BY h.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC ) INNER_QRY WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS h JOIN FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE s ON h.INSTANCE_ID = s.INSTANCE_ID
SELECT TO_CHAR(INSTANCE_ID) FROM FWK_CMS_SERVER_INSTANCE WHERE ALIVE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT NVL(MAX( TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(FILE_ID, '_v(\d+)\.html$', 1, 1, NULL, 1)) ), 0) + 1 FROM FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS WHERE FILE_ID LIKE #{pageId} || '_v%.html'
SELECT PAGE_HTML FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND APPROVE_STATE = 'APPROVED' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_CMS_FILE_SEND_HIS ( INSTANCE_ID, FILE_ID, FILE_SIZE, FILE_CRC_VALUE, LAST_MODIFIER_ID, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{fileId}, #{fileSize}, #{fileCrcValue}, #{userId}, TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
